capabilities.description: Debug-only capability granting the main window access to devtools-related APIs. Tauri only compiles devtools support behind the `devtools` Cargo feature (or a debug build), so this capability is effectively inert in release builds where that feature is not enabled. Inlined here (instead of living in `capabilities/dev.json`) so it is NOT auto-discovered and therefore NEVER loaded for production builds — `tauri.dev.conf.json` is only merged via `tauri dev --config ...` and ignored by `tauri build`.
